title: 他者感情による心理的効果について

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Agnes Tachyon placed excellently in the Twinkle
Series.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hand in hand, we've been able to work our way
through the first three pivotal years of her career.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On a day of respite, while basking in the glory of
our accomplishments...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
...Heh-heh-heh. Hey, Trainer! You've been
spacing out for quite some time!
choice_data_list: Tachyon?!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Little do you know, I've actually been here for the
past five minutes. I fear your sense of danger is a
cause for concern.
choice_data_list: So, what are you doing here?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Oh, nothing much. I just wanted to extend an
invitation to you.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: That is, to go on a "date."

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, Agnes Tachyon and I set off on our
"date" together.
choice_data_list: I didn't expect you to choose an aquarium.
I didn't expect you to choose an aquarium.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
A book I read recommended it for being "replete
with curiosities to promote conversation."

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Look around at these tanks made of such
beautiful acrylic glass! We are beholden to it, the
savior of all aquariums.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Many issues would arise during the time when
reinforced glass was the norm, especially in
regard to its manufactu—

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
...I'm off the mark, aren't I? Fish, right? The
fishes... Oh, how pretty. Like, colorful, aren't
they?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Okay, next we go shopping! In a shopping mall as
big as this, your desire to buy should be amply
stimulated.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Well, Trainer? Don't you want to shop for
anything?
choice_data_list: Nothing in particular for now...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Well, that's problematic, as I too have no desire
to shop. I typically make all my purchases online.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Very well! Onward! To the next destination!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Our "date" continues until I realize the sun is
setting.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Time sure flew right by, didn't it? Well now, after
the "date," do you feel any different?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Does your heart ache? Do you find it hard to
breathe or difficult to think straight? Please, do
report anything that comes to mind.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The word "report" rings a bell in my mind. Could it
be that...
choice_data_list: ...I'm being experimented on?
...I'm being experimented on?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Wasn't it obvious? Are you really just realizing
now?
choice_data_list: How was I supposed to know?!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
We've known each other for three whole years!
Why would I go on a date with you without good
reason?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
I want to record the emotions you're feeling at
this exact moment. Whatever comes to mind is
fine, just describe them in detail.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's difficult to turn her down when she gets like
this. I try to think of something that might satisfy
her.
choice_data_list: I-it was... fun?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Okay, and? What else?
choice_data_list: It was... refreshing!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Argh! Not quite what I was looking for!
choice_data_list: I-I'll remember it as a fond memory?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Wrong! Don't you feel anything like... butterflies
in your stomach, or a spark between us?!
choice_data_list: (B-butterflies or a spark?!)

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Hmmm... My apologies for losing my cool. I don't
take failure very well when it comes to my
research.
choice_data_list: What are you researching this time?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
It's the fundamental factor of the social animal,
those things we call "emotions."

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I faintly remember her saying something similar
once before.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Lately, I've become increasingly curious about the
powers that stem from factors like "enthusiasm"
and "passion."

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Thinking back on it, she expressed her interest in
emotions quite a while before.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I thought it was a passing curiosity, but that no
longer seems to be the case.
choice_data_list: What's gotten you so interested in it?
What's gotten you so interested in it?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
I was made painfully aware... that my long-held
hypothesis is filled with flaws.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
I had always known that a multitude of factors
affect our running.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
But far from being fixed determiners, they were
nothing more than effects resulting from minor
interactions.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: That is what I firmly believed.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She slowly closes her eyes, as if to better
remember that event.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: That day, during the Arima Kinen...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
After finishing the race, I was greeted by a
passionate roar of cheers from the stands.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
I could even hear their voices during the race, like
a strong tailwind lending me strength.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
That is what inspired the desire in me to thank
them sincerely. Casting my gaze toward the
stands, it dawned upon me...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Winning the race that day... And not only that,
but managing to reach the Classics with my own
two feet...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
All of these accomplishments were, perhaps, only
possible due to emotion.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
It occurred to me that I might have severely
underestimated the true extent of its power.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Agnes Tachyon opens her eyes slowly.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
In retrospect, I was only able to choose the road
toward success because of your sentiments.
choice_data_list: (In a way, what she says is true...)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Looking back, words I would casually impart
often had a large effect on her decision-making.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After all, I always wanted her to discover the
"limits of Umamusume-kind" through her own
efforts.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Heh-heh, I used to believe that things like
emotions were the furthest from the realm of
science.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
But color me surprised, science and human
emotion are inseparable! Oh, how naive I have
been!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Throughout these past three years, the subject of
emotions seems to have captivated Agnes
Tachyon more than I realized.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
If we are to aim higher still, it is imperative to
decipher and examine these emotions to the
fullest!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Wouldn't you agree, my dear guinea pig?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
So once again, I find myself surprised at her
underlying motive.
choice_data_list: You're even more...
You're even more...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
What? Finish your sentence. You've made me
curious.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She conquered the limits of her own Umamusume
body, and in her senior year, managed to realize
her childhood dream.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Looking at it another way, that same
experiment-loving troublemaker is just a diligent
hard worker.
choice_data_list: You're even more of a fanatic than I thought.
You're even more of a fanatic than I thought.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: ...Heh-heh-heh!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Hahaha! Hey, come on! Did you really have to put
it that way? That was borderline slander!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
And a first, too. Some might've called me
self-centered, or a lone wolf, but never a fanatic!
Ahahaha!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I must've hit a funny bone, as her laughter doesn't
subside for quite a while.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Sigh... That was a good one.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Though, since your impression comes from a
three-year-long history together, it must have
some truth to it.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Thinking back, you've done a lot for me. At the
risk of sounding cliché...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
I'm deeply thankful that you chose to be my
trainer.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
I'll say it again, although it's a bit embarrassing,
but thank you for everything. You've been a great
help to me.
choice_data_list: Tachyon!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I never could've imagined Agnes Tachyon
expressing her gratitude with such sincerity. It's
enough to make me crack a smile.
choice_data_list: And I'm happy to be your trainer!
And I'm happy to be your trainer!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, thank you so much. You are undeniably a
fantastic...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: A fantastic guinea pig, heh-heh-heh!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
So, guinea pig, can you tell me once again how
you feel at this moment?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In Agnes Tachyon's hands are a heart rate
monitor and a voice recorder, raring to go!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
At any rate, our eyes are set on the potential of
Umamusume and that which lies beyond.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And the next chapter of our journey has only just
begun.
